payload.answer: This looks additive: the new preference can be stored alongside the existing one without replacing it.
repair_options: add_new: Add that Sam from Goldman also likes Sonny Rollins, keeping the existing Bill Evans preference unchanged.
keep_existing: Keep only the existing memory that Sam from Goldman likes Bill Evans and do not add the Sonny Rollins preference.
edit: Edit the preference details before saving, e.g., clarify whether Sam likes both Bill Evans and Sonny Rollins.
cancel: Do not make any changes.
